images.description: Abstract blue liquid/light reflections for subtle modal background
Abstract blue geometric shapes for 'New Trader' selection card
Black and green wavy lines for 'Experienced Trader' selection card

WizardDialog.description: Full-screen modal on mobile, centered on desktop. Glassmorphism background.
WizardDialog.classes: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4 sm:p-6

StepIndicator.description: Segmented progress bar at the top. Active step glows.
StepIndicator.structure: Flex container with gaps. Each segment is a div.

SelectionCard.description: Large tappable area for user type selection. Image background with gradient overlay.
SelectionCard.classes: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-zinc-800 hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-all duration-300 group cursor-pointer h-48

InputGroup.description: Floating label style or minimal bottom border. High contrast text.
InputGroup.classes: bg-zinc-950/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-cyan-500/20 text-lg py-6

PrimaryButton.description: Full width, bold gradient, neon shadow.
PrimaryButton.classes: w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-600 to-blue-600 hover:from-cyan-500 hover:to-blue-500 text-white font-bold py-6 rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(6,182,212,0.3)] transition-all active:scale-95

layout_strategy.grid: Single column for mobile, 2-column for desktop selection

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Use `framer-motion` for smooth transitions between steps (AnimatePresence).
3. Implement the state machine for the wizard (Step 1 -> Step 2a/2b -> etc.).
4. Use the provided image URLs for the selection cards.
6. Use `lucide-react` for icons (ChevronRight, Wallet, History, TrendingUp).
7. The 'New Trader' flow skips history/trade entry steps.
8. The 'Experienced Trader' flow includes Date, Deposits, and Trade History steps.
9. For the Trade History step, create a 'Trade Entry Card' that looks like a ticket/receipt.
10. STRICTLY follow the color palette. No default blue, use Cyan/Teal accents.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, uniform styling).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Do NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`).
Do NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures and noise overlays are encouraged.
